title: Mica · Sites Widget
direction: W11 Mica + CWS Sites widget — Win11 Settings.app generous-whitespace category sidebar (5 categories only), one canonical Sites widget in a corner, big visible 'Open fullscreen' button on the Live Preview category. Fixes v1 #15's missing affordance.
thesis: Windows 11 Settings.app applied to WordPress Playground: a five-row Mica category sidebar on the left (the only navigation surface), an explicit big 'Open fullscreen' button on the Live Preview category (the v1 #15 fix), and a single canonical Sites widget in the top-left corner that is the sole door to launcher/library/saved. Mica everywhere — backdrop-filter blur(40px) saturate(180%) on every chrome surface — so the iframe really is the wallpaper sampled through the glass.
